block_00:
Professional vs Novice Traders
3 Main Differences
block_01: When you think of successful investors, chances are names like Warren Buffett, George Soros, and Abigail Johnson come to mind. What is it that helped them achieve greatness?
block_02: There are always similarities between accomplished people. By looking at what they do right, you can use their success in your favor. Today we break down 3 important lessons you can learn from pro traders and how to apply them to your trading.
